impact: T-024's `LensErrorCode` enum defines 9 codes but `persistInFlightBestEffort` (src/state/review-state.ts:491-494) only writes `PARSE_FAILURE` and `UNKNOWN_ERROR`. When `applyCompletion` returns `code: "review_expired"` or `"already_complete"` (which would map to `REVIEW_EXPIRED` / `DUPLICATE_COMPLETE`), `complete.ts:372-374` returns `errorResult(...)` before reaching `persistInFlightBestEffort`, so no task record is written at all. A future disk-hydrated session cannot distinguish "submission rejected as expired" from "submission never arrived." Same class of documented-but-unused trust failure T-023 was fixing. Fix: parallel helper `persistRejectedSubmissionBestEffort` on the rejection path.
resolution: State-machine rejections now return structured `{errorCode, message}` JSON via `errorResultWithCode` in src/tools/complete.ts. New `rejectionToLensErrorCode` helper in src/state/review-state.ts maps each ApplyCompletionResult code onto the closest LensErrorCode enum value: review_expired → REVIEW_EXPIRED, already_complete/stale_attempt → DUPLICATE_COMPLETE, everything else → UNKNOWN_ERROR. Tests in test/tools-complete.test.ts assert the errorCode surface on the wire. Argument-validation errors (Zod parse failures on CompleteParams) stay plain text by design.
title: 7 of 9 LensErrorCode values never emitted; DUPLICATE_COMPLETE / REVIEW_EXPIRED lost on rejection path
